tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows significant hyperglycemia with normal HbA1c, suggesting possible acute or stress-related elevation. Lipid profile indicates marked dyslipidemia (high total cholesterol, LDL, triglycerides, and low HDL), increasing cardiovascular risk. Mild hyperchloremia is noted, but renal function and microalbumin/creatinine ratio are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation for diabetes and aggressive management of dyslipidemia.
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
